---
title: "Uses"
date: 2025-07-31
categories: [personal]
---

[What is a `/uses` page?](https://uses.tech/)

A list of things I use, tolerate, or somehow rely on almost daily. Some of them I love. Some are just there.

_Last updated: 2025-07-31_

### Tech Machines

- MacBook Pro 14" (M1 Pro)
- iPhone 16
- Apple Watch Series 6
- AirPods Pro 2
- Apple TV

### Apps and Services

- Apple Mail
- Apple Calendar
- TickTick
- Arc Browser
- Obsidian
- Zotero
- Jupyter Notebooks
- Mathematica
- Office 365
- Cursor
- Overleaf
- Bitwarden
- Dropbox
- Google One
- iCloud
- iTerm2
- ChatGPT Plus
- Spotify
- Netflix
- Disney+
- YouTube Premium
- Balance
- WeChat
- Telegram
- Lark

### Music Production and DJ

I do not make music or DJ often, but when I do, I use these.

- Ableton Live
- Ableton Push
- M-Audio Keystation 88 MK3
- AKAI MIDImix
- Bose Soundlink Mini II
- Pioneer DDJ-400
- Rekordbox
